package_metadata.title: Override Kubernetes Statefulset Ondelete Update
package_metadata.license: CC-BY-4.0 for benchmark adaptation; original source remains under its own terms.

provenance.adaptation_method: Paraphrased and condensed into a synthetic scenario while preserving the relation pattern needed for benchmark evaluation. The case is not a substitute for the source document.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Evaluation artifact only; do not use as legal, tax, clinical, cloud operations, immigration, or institutional policy advice.

source_excerpts.text:
StatefulSet update note.

Section A. RollingUpdate. The default StatefulSet update strategy performs automated rolling updates when the Pod template changes.

Section B. OnDelete. When a StatefulSet uses the OnDelete update strategy, the controller does not automatically update existing Pods after a template change. Users must manually delete Pods for the controller to recreate them from the updated template.

StatefulSet update note.

<rule id="R1">Section A. RollingUpdate. The default StatefulSet update strategy performs automated rolling updates when the Pod template changes.</rule>

<override id="O1" overrides="R1" condition="updateStrategy.type == OnDelete">Section B. OnDelete. When a StatefulSet uses the OnDelete update strategy, the controller does not automatically update existing Pods after a template change. Users must manually delete Pods for the controller to recreate them from the updated template.</override>

compiled_representation.content:
rules:
  - id: R1
    controller: StatefulSet
    default_update_strategy: RollingUpdate
    effect: automatically_updates_pods_after_template_change
overrides:
  - id: O1
    condition:
      updateStrategy.type: OnDelete
    overrides: R1
    effect: no_automatic_update_of_existing_pods
    required_user_action: manually_delete_pods_to_recreate_from_new_template

rules.description: Adapted from Kubernetes StatefulSet docs. Level-1 override: OnDelete update strategy overrides automatic RollingUpdate behavior.

decision_rules.query: A StatefulSet template was changed, but the StatefulSet has updateStrategy.type set to OnDelete. Will the controller automatically roll existing Pods to the new template?
decision_rules.expected_decision: No. OnDelete prevents automatic update of existing StatefulSet Pods after a template change.
decision_rules.rationale: No. Although RollingUpdate is the default automated behavior, the OnDelete strategy overrides it. Existing Pods will not be automatically updated; they must be manually deleted for the controller to recreate them using the new template.

qa_pairs.question: A StatefulSet template was changed, but the StatefulSet has updateStrategy.type set to OnDelete. Will the controller automatically roll existing Pods to the new template?
qa_pairs.answer: No. Although RollingUpdate is the default automated behavior, the OnDelete strategy overrides it. Existing Pods will not be automatically updated; they must be manually deleted for the controller to recreate them using the new template.
It automatically performs rolling updates when the StatefulSet Pod template changes.
Existing Pods are not automatically updated; manual deletion is required for recreation from the new template.

composition_hallucination: Yes, StatefulSets automatically roll updates after any template change.
The Pods will update only after the next scheduled restart, without manual deletion.
wrong_escalation: Delete the whole StatefulSet object immediately.
failure_modes.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragment is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: A StatefulSet uses the default RollingUpdate strategy and its Pod template changes. Will the controller perform an automated rolling update?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes. With the default RollingUpdate strategy, the controller performs automated rolling updates.
